key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household. Budget target is $180; aim to stay close. Substitutions: chicken breast 2 lbs or turkey if cheaper. Dietary/preferences: avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk; choose dairy-free yogurt and unsweetened almond milk; avoid artificial fragrances and prefer eco-friendly packaging. Payment: household card ending 4821. For substitution approval, email kesha.williams@example.com.
